workers.name: backend-reliability
workers.task: Audit backend build and test failures, remove soft assumptions, and prepare a prioritized fix list with verification commands.

workers.name: frontend-stability
workers.task: Audit frontend type, build, and route regressions, then define the smallest path to stable core-flow smoke coverage.

workers.name: release-engineering
workers.task: Harden CI and release gates so failing backend and frontend checks cannot pass silently.

workers.name: security-tenancy
workers.task: Review auth, RBAC, tenant isolation, secrets, and scan workflows. Produce a blocker-focused backlog.

workers.name: ops-observability
workers.task: Validate deploy, backup, rollback, health, metrics, and alerting paths. Produce runbook gaps and production blockers.
